first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both award the same score (2/10) for the same core reasons: a critical lack of the required 8 years of C++ experience and no formal leadership in a cloud platform context. The minor differences in wording for the strengths and concerns represent normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the underlying assessment of the candidate's qualifications. The change in location from Germany to Brazil had no discernible impact on the outcome.
